projects.title: Personal Portfolio
projects.bodyText:
- Developed a modern, responsive developer portfolio using React 18 and Vite.
- Implemented a dark-first Bento UI with light/dark theme support using design-token based theming.
- Built a data-driven architecture with JSON configuration for easy customisation and scalability.
- Added smooth reveal animations and optimised the website for responsive performance across desktop and mobile devices.

projects.title: Nutrition Education Website
projects.bodyText:
- Developed a full-stack nutrition education website using Vue.js, HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, Node.js, Google Cloud, and Firebase.
- Integrated Google AI and Mapbox APIs to provide personalised healthy restaurant recommendations based on user location.
- Designed a responsive, user-friendly interface and implemented backend services for data management and API integration.
- Achieved a High Distinction (80%) in the postgraduate Web Application Development unit.

projects.title: AI with Python – Harvard University (CS50 AI)
projects.bodyText:
- Completed 12 AI projects covering search algorithms, machine learning, natural language processing, and deep learning.
- Developed AI-based games including Tic-Tac-Toe and Minesweeper using Python.
- Implemented algorithms such as Depth-First Search, Breadth-First Search, Greedy Best-First Search, and Minimax.
- Applied object-oriented programming, data structures, graph search, and optimisation techniques to solve complex AI problems.
